name: Muffins, Queen Of
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the Egg Beaters to the mixture and stir well.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) into a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, stirring gently after each addition.
5. Mix until just combined; do not overmix.
6. Fold in 1 cup of blueberries, cranberries, or your chosen fruit.
7. Grease muffin rings and pour the batter into each cavity.
8. Bake at 400°F for about 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
